architecture_findings.impact: The cross-language architecture is not accepted; this UI is evidence navigation only.
22/22 named canaries do not exercise true validator mutation paths; real mutation-path coverage is zero.
Language adaptation text is candidate scaffolding, not independently reviewed linguistic analysis.

example_english: I usually listen to Thai songs.

What do you usually drink?

What do Thai people usually eat with?

British people usually eat with a knife and a fork.
What do you usually do in your free time?
How often do you usually bake?
I usually run 6 kilometers a day, but today I can't because my feet hurt so much.
Do you usually cook for yourself?
No, I usually eat out. Sometimes I order from Grab. What about you?
What does she usually do?
Anna is Thai. She usually wakes up at 6 am every day.
Tony usually rides his bicycle to school because his school is not far from his house.
I forgot to bring my wallet today but I usually bring it.
Normally, if I have free time, I will go to the market to buy food and suppies.
He looks so normal I can't tell he's depressed.
I usually work 8 hours a day from Monday to Friday.
Normally, there is a lot of traffic in Bangkok in the morning.
Normally the boss has a meeting from 8 am to 9 am.
How many hours do you usually work at your company per day?
Where do you usually go to buy souvenirs when you visit Thailand?
For things that I usually have to buy at the mall, I like to order online because they are inexpensive.
I usually carry cash because I don't have a credit card.

example_english: What's wrong? You look unwell.
I have a cold.

Does your throat hurt?

It hurts.

Do you have a headache?

What’s wrong? / What are your symptoms?
I have a stomachache and I'm throwing up.
Do you have a fever?
What are your symptoms?
I have a sore throat, a headache, and a runny nose.
Have you recovered from your cold?
Have you recovered from your cough?
Are you feeling better?
I am feeling better.
I'm allergic to seafood.
I'm not allergic to anything.
What's wrong? / What are your symptoms?
My eyes hurt.
How long have your eyes been sore?
I've had a sore eye for 2 days now.
I have diarrhea, stomachache and vomiting.
How long have you had these symptoms?
I've had symptoms for a week now.
I'm going to the beach with my family.
Where are you going this weekend?
I'm going to Doi Suthep with my friends because the weather is nice this month.
Where are you going next month?
I'll go hiking with my husband. There aren't many tourists now.
What country do you want to visit the most?
I want to visit Japan the most.
Because the weather is not hot and the food is delicious.
What province do you want to visit the most? Why?
I want to visit Phuket the most. Because I have never been there.
What region is Bangkok in?
Bangkok is in the central region.
What region is California in?
The state of California is in the western region.
What region is Shanghai in?
Shanghai is in the east.
How do you go to Lopburi Province?
I will go by train.
I will take the train.
How did you go to Koh Samui?
I went to Koh Samui by boat.
I took a boat.
How did you get here?
I got here by bus.
What countries have you been to?
I have been to many countries, such as Japan, China, India, Malaysia, Italy, and Mexico. What about you?
I have been to New Zealand, Nepal, and Vietnam.
Which country do you like the most?
I like India the most.
Because there are many tourist attractions there and the food is very delicious.
What are you going to do this long holiday?
I'm going to Koh Samui with my family.
How will you get to Koh Samui?
I'll take a plane to Surat Thani Province first and then take a boat to Koh Samui.
How long does it take? From the pier to Koh Samui.
It takes about 1.5 hours if you take the ferry.
It doesn't take long. Anyway, have fun on your trip!
What visa do you have now?
I have a 3-month tourist visa now.
I have a student visa.
Where did you apply for a student visa?
I applied for a student visa at TSL School.
Is it difficult?
It’s not difficult. If you have all the documents and really want to learn Thai, they can advise you.
I would like to apply for a student visa.
Do you have all the documents?
I would like to cancel my visa.
Excuse me, which way to immigration?
Can I see your passport please?
Please wait for the officer for about 10 minutes.
Excuse me, where is the bank? I want to exchange money.
At Maya Mall, there are many banks there.
Hi, Mom. I am going out with my friends tomorrow.
Mom, can you transfer me some money?
1,000 baht is enough, Mom. Thank you.
Excuse me, do you accept credit cards?
No, we only accept cash.
You can transfer via PromptPay.
Hello, are you interested in applying for a credit card?
No, I already have two credit cards.
You can have more.
That's okay, thank you.
Excuse me, can I exchange coins?
How much do you want?
I'd like two ten-baht coins.
Can you give me a discount?
Can I have one plate of fried rice without vegetables?
Do you this bowl of noodles have beef in it?
Excuse me, can I have some condiments?
Can I have red curry without MSG?
Can you use chopsticks?
Can I have a menu in Thai, please?

example_english: Where are you going on vacation this holiday?
I'm going to the beach with my family.
Where are you going this weekend?
I'm going to Doi Suthep with my friends because the weather is nice this month.
Where are you going next month?
What country do you want to visit the most?
I want to visit Japan the most.
What province do you want to visit the most? Why?
I want to visit Phuket the most. Because I have never been there.
Which region do you like the most? Why?
The islands there are very beautiful, making many foreign tourists visit there.
But if you visit there, you will like it very much.
If you have free time, you should visit the central region.
I usually take the bus to school.
I usually drive to work.
My son usually likes to ride a motorcycle to travel on Saturdays and Sundays.
What countries have you been to?
I have been to many countries, such as Japan, China, India, Malaysia, Italy, and Mexico. What about you?
I'm going to Koh Samui with my family.
Excuse me, where is the bank? I want to exchange money.
Hi, Mom. I am going out with my friends tomorrow.
How much do you want? I will transfer it at the ATM tomorrow.
Excuse me, can I exchange coins?
I want to buy two pink T-shirts for my girlfriend.
In winter, Thais like to go to the mountains.
This glass of iced tea is too sweet. I can't drink it.
If you go to Thailand, you must eat sticky rice with mango because it is very delicious.
My son usually eats hot milk and bread before going to school every day.
Why didn't you come to school?
I have to go to work in the city this morning.
Thai people use spoons and forks to eat.

example_english: I want a new washing machine, but I don't know what brand to buy.

I want Saturday to come quickly.

example_english: It depends. On weekends, I go to the mountains in Chiang Mai.
But if it’s a long holiday, I’ll go to a different province.
If your wife asks why you come home late, what would you say?
If your house is flooded, what will you do?
If you forget to submit your homework to your teacher, what will you do?
If you have an appointment with a client at a restaurant at 10am and they are late, what would you do?
If you have an important meeting at the company at 9 o'clock, but now you are on the road because there is a car accident causing a traffic jam, what would you do?
If I have free time, I cook for myself. But if I don't have free time, I buy from outside.
But if I have to cook for every meal, I can't do it. It's too tiring.
Hmm, that's a good idea. If you're interested in cooking on your own, you can always ask me.
I have to be good at Thai if I want to stay in Thailand, otherwise it will be difficult to communicate with others.
Normally, if I have free time, I will go to the market to buy food and suppies.
Sometimes I have work, sometimes I don't, and if there is an urgent job, I have to take it immediately because if I don't take it, I'm not sure if I will have work the next day.
Why do he and his girlfriend have problems and if James were your friend, what would you advise him?
If you were James' girlfriend, what would you do?
When she has free time, Lisa will go for a walk at the market.
If I have a day off, I will find time to relax with my girlfriend.
If you turn on the air conditioner, you shouldn't open the door because it will waste a lot of electricity. Do you understand?
If you would like to borrow a book, please sign here.
If you are a Thai merchant with a souvenir shop, how would you market your shop to make it sell well?
If you come to Chiang Mai, I will show you around. I know Chiang Mai very well because I was born and raised here.
Or if you want to study, you can study online.
No, I'm too old to run. But walking is fine.

example_english: I think it's been about 3 years. How about you? Since when have you been interested in baking?

I think it was at the company.
Do you smell something bad? I think it smells like rotten eggs.

I don't think I can walk, I heard it's a long way.
I don't like hiring a maid. I think it's better to do the housework myself.
What do you think are your special abilities?
Which do you think is better, cooking at home or buying food from a restaurant?
I think it's better to cook for myself because it's cleaner and more frugal.
I agree. I think I'll try learning how to cook from YouTube.
What kind of person do you think you are?
What do you think she is like?
What do you think his sister is like?
What do you think of his brother?
What do you think she’s like?
I think she is confident, intelligent and polite.
I know you like Vietnamese food, so I bought it for you.
My sister doesn't know you're a policeman.
I think some Indian and Thai food have similar tastes
I think all cats in the world have the same tendency to like to sleep

I think the difference is the softness of the dough and the appearance of the donuts.
What do you think of him?
I think he is smart, polite, calm but quite quiet.
Do you think computers and tablets are similar or different? How?
Do you think fish sauce and soy sauce are the same or different? How?
Do you think soy milk and cow's milk are the same or different? How?
I thought my neighbor was cooking because I smelled something good.
He felt guilty and decided not to be careless again.
I think you should buy some jewelry or flowers.
In the North, I think Chiang Mai is the most comfortable because other provinces are too quiet.
You feel that living here isn't safe.
You mostly buy things at the mall rather than fresh markets because you think they are cleaner.
You think the water here is not expensive.
You wonder why the fruit from fruit carts is cheap and fresh.
I have lived in Chiang Mai for decades and I speak Thai fluently. Many people mistake me for a Thai person.
My mother misunderstood that the electricity bill this month was 500 baht but it was actually 1500 baht.
I still can't figure out what we should eat for dinner. So, it's up to you.
I don't think he's that kind of person. I'm really speechless.
I can't think of where to take my family for the holidays.

What does James do for a living and what does he think of his job?
I feel that it is not safe here.
Do you think being an exchange student like Jenny would be interesting and would you like to do that?
I want to buy shoes for my daughter, but I don't know what kind to buy.
I'm not sure, but I think it's made of beans.
Do you know what this drink is made of? It tastes so good.
What do you think are the famous souvenirs in Thailand?
Come on, don't think too much. When you're free, let's go drinking. We can discuss anything.
I don't know if Japanese food is to your taste, but I think you should try it.
I feel that the more I learn Thai, the more fun it becomes.
Which do you think is better, getting married or not getting married?
Which do you think is better for me to do, swimming or playing tennis?
Which do you think is better, Thai food or Japanese food?
I've learned that I can work from anywhere, as long as I have internet.
But I feel that the more I stay home and work from home, the more I like it.
In addition to having time for myself and my family, I think my expenses have decreased, especially gas and coffee.
Which do you prefer, shopping online or in stores?
I never knew you could speak Japanese.

example_english: Disappointment hurts him
My mother always told me that love is blind.
Eating spicy food gives you stomachache and diarrhea.
Hot weather makes you feel irritable.
Drinking coffee in the morning makes you feel refreshed.
Love makes people blind. / Love is blind.
Waking up late gives you a headache.
Staying up late is bad for your health.
If you have an important meeting at the company at 9 o'clock, but now you are on the road because there is a car accident causing a traffic jam, what would you do?
But this morning, he is not lucky because it is raining heavily and the road is slippery.
Today, there was a special activity at school, so he hurried and was not careful, so he had an accident.
Due to the Covid situation, many people have lost their jobs.
Due to the lack of staff, the service is slow. You have to accept it.
Due to the Covid situation, many people are unemployed.
Thailand is a country with an affordable cost of living, making it a country that many tourists are interested in and travel to.
This is the reason why my girlfriend and I have been fighting all the time because our lifestyles are different.
But it's good that I can cook for myself, and coming here on the exchange has made me grow up more.
The internet has made my life much more convenient.
I see old people at the market and I can't help but think of my grandmother who lives in the countryside.
Because if father knows, he will cause the secret to leak and cause grandmother not to be excited.
Drinking two or three cups of coffee a day causes you not to be able to sleep.
Practicing speaking Thai every day will make you better at speaking.
Driving fast will cause accidents to happen easily.
After going for a massage for two hours, it made me feel relaxed.
Trying new things makes life more colourful.
This hairstyle makes you look younger.
Pink clothes make you look cute and harmless.
Learning Thai every day makes you better at speaking.
Drinking a lot of beer makes me sleepy.
Not resting enough makes you sick.
Spending extravagantly will make you poorer.
Eating a lot makes you gain weight.

example_english: Learning Thai is very important and necessary.

Oh no, you have to clean it up right away, okay?
You have to hold this bag carefully. Don't drop it.

Wow, that's great. I can't cook, so I always have to buy it.
But if I have to cook for every meal, I can't do it. It's too tiring.

I woke up late, so I had to rush to work.
I have to report to the immigration office every 90 days.
My aunt broke her washing machine so she had to fix it.
Tony was in too much of a hurry because he woke up late and had to take an exam.
It's a little sore. I've applied some medicine. Don't worry.
Even if you don't want to eat, you have to eat.
Everyone must have their temperature taken first, otherwise they will not be able to enter the mall or market.

You have to work hard, or you'll get fired.
I promised him that I would go to the movies with him so I have to go.
There is an important meeting tomorrow so we have to prepare well.

I have to be good at Thai if I want to stay in Thailand, otherwise it will be difficult to communicate with others.
When you travel abroad, you should bring medicine in case you need it.
Even though she is sick, she still has to work hard because she has many responsibilities.
Next month, my husband has to move to a new job in the suburbs.
But you have to be very patient when walking around the market because it is both hot and crowded.
This morning I received a call from a Japanese customer but I couldn't understand what he wanted.
Sometimes I have work, sometimes I don't, and if there is an urgent job, I have to take it immediately because if I don't take it, I'm not sure if I will have work the next day.
Sometimes my clients are abroad and we have to have online meetings at 2 or 3 in the morning because of the time zone difference.
Why does James sometimes have to go out and work at a coffee shop?
Today I woke up late, so I have to rush to the meeting.
If you want to be healthy, you have to eat healthy food.
I heard you have to work overtime today. I'll go to 7-Eleven and buy you dinner.
Today I'm going to make a passport in case I have to go to a meeting in Singapore next month.
He booked a plane ticket because he had to attend a close friend's wedding in two days.
He packed his bag because he has to attend a seminar in Phuket.
You have to practice speaking every day to be good at it.
I'm bored of waiting for my girlfriend to get dressed and put on makeup for so long.
I study very hard and I have to be responsible for everything, but it's good that I get to meet new friends.

What kind of desk do you want?
I have to go to a meeting for a few days next week. Can I leave my cat at your place?
In Thailand, there are many famous products that tourists like and must bring back to their country.
You don't have to treat me. If we go together, we can split the cost.
Mr. Winit has 3 cars. Mr. Winit does not need to buy another car.
I have a dinner meeting with a client tonight. Don't wait for me.
For things that I usually have to buy at the mall, I like to order online because they are inexpensive.
Since the outbreak of Covid many people have had to work from home.
Thank you very much. Actually, you didn’t have to buy any. So considerate of you.

example_english: I don't know what he likes or dislikes because he never tells me.

ช่วงนี้ไข้หวัดระบาด ใคร ๆ ก็ไม่สบาย อย่าลืมดูแลสุขภาพด้วยนะ
ใคร ๆ ก็เชื่อกันว่า ทำดีได้ดี ทำชั่วได้ชั่ว ทำอย่างไรก็ได้อย่างนัน

example_english: Comedy movies are light, stress-free, relaxing along with the characters, helping to relieve stress, suitable for everyone.
Fantasy films are mainly imaginative and are stories that do not actually exist. There may be wizards, witches, fairies/angels, or magic.
Science fiction movies tend to be a bit over-the-top in their references to science, evolution, and modern technology and their possibilities.
Dramas focus on the sadness of the characters or the real life of a person who is sad. Watching it makes you feel depressed, sad and stressed, but it is real life.
Family movies are movies that tell stories about relationships among family members. They are easy, relaxed, and not complicated, and can be watched by anyone.
Horror movies are films about scary spirits, evoking feelings of terror and unease throughout.

If you had a boyfriend who was very jealous and called you every hour, how would you feel?
